import os
import click
from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass
class AppConfig:
    api_key: str
    base_url: str
    timeout: int
    s3_bucket: str
    aws_region: str
    max_upload_size: int
    db_host: str
    db_port: str
    db_name: str
    report_format: str

    @classmethod
    def from_env(cls) -> "AppConfig":
        return cls(
            api_key=os.environ.get("API_KEY", ""),
            base_url=os.environ.get("API_BASE_URL", "https://api.example.com"),
            timeout=int(os.environ.get("API_TIMEOUT", "30")),
            s3_bucket=os.environ.get("S3_BUCKET", ""),
            aws_region=os.environ.get("AWS_REGION", "us-east-1"),
            max_upload_size=int(os.environ.get("MAX_UPLOAD_SIZE", "10485760")),
            db_host=os.environ.get("DB_HOST", "localhost"),
            db_port=os.environ.get("DB_PORT", "5432"),
            db_name=os.environ.get("DB_NAME", "app"),
            report_format=os.environ.get("REPORT_FORMAT", "pdf"),
        )


pass_config = click.make_pass_decorator(AppConfig, ensure=True)


@click.group()
@click.pass_context
def cli(ctx):
    ctx.ensure_object(AppConfig)
    ctx.obj = AppConfig.from_env()


@cli.command()
@click.option("--user-id", required=True)
@pass_config
def fetch_user(config, user_id):
    click.echo(f"Fetching {user_id} from {config.base_url}")


@cli.command()
@click.option("--filename", required=True)
@pass_config
def upload(config, filename):
    click.echo(f"Uploading {filename} to {config.s3_bucket} in {config.aws_region}")


@cli.command()
@pass_config
def report(config):
    click.echo(f"Generating {config.report_format} from {config.db_host}:{config.db_port}")
